creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 226972
devel/libffcall: update to 2.4 and take over maintainership.

The maintainer of this port is unfortunately unreachable.  Yahoo is kind to let me know that the mailbox is disabled.  I am willing to take over maintainership.

Please somebody check if the updated library still builds on PPC64 and MIPS.  I cannot test PPC64 because QEMU doesn't wanna work.  I have patched out the USE_GCC because it is no longer needed on any of the platforms I tested on (amd64 i386 armv7 arm64).  If it is still needed for one of these platforms, please let me know so I can put it back in.
